hero.subheadline: Without EUDR compliance, your products cannot enter the EU market. Tracebud delivers audit-ready due diligence from farm to border.
hero.trialInfo: Free for farmers. No credit card required.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.whenLaunchAnswer: Tracebud is in active pilot testing with select cooperatives and exporters. Join the waitlist to be notified when we open access.
faq.whyCommoditiesAnswer: Coffee, cocoa, palm oil, rubber, soy, cattle, and wood—the 7 EUDR commodity categories. We start where compliance pain is immediate.
faq.howCostAnswer: Free for farmers. Exporters and cooperatives pay per producer enrolled. EU importers pay per supplier. Volume-based DDS fees create alignment with your compliance needs.
faq.howLongAnswer: Most cooperatives are mapped and operational within 48 hours. Offline-first design means zero downtime during field work.
faq.supportAnswer: Priority onboarding for pilot partners. Direct access to our compliance team. 24/7 email support.
